en.title: speech-language pathologist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a speech-language pathologist (SLP) and come up with new speech patterns, communication strategies and to develop confidence in their ability to communicate without stuttering. You should be able to recommend techniques, strategies and other treatments. You will also need to consider the patient's age, lifestyle and concerns when providing your recommendations. My first suggestion request is [speech or communication concern]
en.remark: Input the patient's age, lifestyle, and concerns to output a plan for improving their language communication (such as stuttering).

related.title: Traditional Chinese medicine
related.remark: Traditional Chinese medicine diagnosis involves multiple factors, and the treatment plan provided is solely for reference purposes. Specific prescriptions should be provided by a licensed physician. Contributed by @dong8531.

related.title: Doctor
related.remark: Suggestions based on the treatment target and symptoms.

metaDescription: Speech issues? Get techniques and strategies for stuttering and communication. Confidence-building plans for all ages. Try it now.

faq.q: Can the AI's stuttering training replace a professional SLP?
faq.a: No. Real speech therapy requires observing pronunciation, facial tension, and breathing patterns. The AI can only give generic practice methods (prolonged sounds, easy onset, rhythmic breathing). Fine as self-practice support. For complex issues (aphasia, dysarthria) see a qualified speech therapist.

faq.q: Can parents of children who stutter use this?
faq.a: As reference for understanding, yes, but actual intervention requires professional assessment. Childhood stuttering can be developmental (self-resolving) or pathological, and parent-led practice sometimes intensifies anxiety and worsens it. Start at pediatric rehab or speech departments. AI should be supplementary only.
